items.title: Billionaire Marc Andreessen Says AI Will Be So Powerful 'Everything That Costs $100 Will Sell For A Penny' In A Hyper-Deflation Era
items.description: A surge in AI-driven productivity could trigger hyper-deflation, making items once priced at $100 drop to a penny, billionaire investor Marc Andreessen said recently. The Andreessen Horowitz co-founder described a future in which "the price of ...

items.title: Ice Cold, Zen-Like Investing With Alex King
items.description: Alex King from Cestrian Capital Research and Growth Investor Pro on staying calm in volatile and confusing markets.

items.title: Consumer Tech News (Oct 20-Oct 24): Elon Musk Warns Against NASA-DOT Move, Apple Faces Antitrust Heat And More
items.description: Elon Musk criticizes plan to fold NASA into Department of Transportation, claims it threatens agency's independence and US space leadership.

items.title: Weekly Market Wrap: IBM, Grindr, and Ford
items.description: We are now in the second-longest government shutdown era, and its impact can be felt in growing dissatisfaction among furloughed workers, economic instability in regional banks, and increasing uncertainty over back pay.
